title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Swiggy Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Swiggy Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
